description: A Node.js developer's Docker environment in /home/ga/projects/shadow-bug/ is broken. The application crashes with 'Error: Cannot find module express' because the host's directory is shadowing the container's node_modules. Fix the docker-compose.yml configuration so that the application starts successfully and responds at http://localhost:3000, the .:/app bind mount remains active for hot-reloading, and the node_modules installed inside the image are preserved. Do not run npm install on the host machine; dependencies must come from the container image.
